title: ilex stenura
intro: Ilex stenura, also known as the Chinese holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex stenura include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to protect against cancer and cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Ilex stenura can be made into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
